content.subhead: Here is Info on Page Three

integrationTests.description: Smoke test — plain variable interpolation
Dot-path access into nested object
Loop over array of strings using {{.}}
Loop over array of objects, accessing properties by name
Object section renders once — used for optional wrapper elements
Motivating case — clTable with rows of cell arrays
Outer object array with inner object array — clDefinitionList pattern
Outer-scope variable resolves correctly alongside inner loop
Empty outer array renders to just the surrounding markup
Outer iterates; inner with empty array renders nothing for that iteration
Loop key absent from data — section renders empty, no key-name leak (was the bug)
Two sibling loops in one template
Legacy {{#}} / {{/}} shorthand for top-level array data
Alternative primitive current-element syntax {{.*}} in string arrays
Access specific array index via dot syntax

article: first paragraph.
second paragraph.
third paragraph.

integrationTests.description: Data containing literal $ characters (replace() escape)
Template-like tokens in data should not be re-parsed as template
Auto-injected loopIndex (0-based) and loopNum (1-based) tokens
Three-level nesting: outer and inner render, third level stripped, no crash
integrationTests.notes: Third-level loop is stripped before inner substitution. Expected output reflects graceful degradation, not working 3-level nesting.

integrationTests.description: Dot-path access to nested properties on loop items
integrationTests.inlineExpectedOutput:
• Jane studied Philosophy at NYU
  • Joe studied Computer Science at MIT
